seo.title: AI Edit: Reshape Your Meeting Minutes with a Single Instruction | Minutes.AI
seo.description: Minutes.AI's new AI Edit feature lets you refine, restructure, and customize auto-generated meeting minutes with natural-language commands. Make them executive-ready, concise, or action-focused instantly.
seo.ogTitle: AI Edit: Your Minutes, Your Way — Powered by AI
seo.ogDescription: Stop settling for generic meeting notes. AI Edit lets you reshape minutes with simple prompts like 'make it concise' or 'extract action items in detail.'

ld.headline: AI Edit: Reshape Your Meeting Minutes with a Single Instruction
ld.description: An introduction to Minutes.AI's AI Edit feature that lets users refine auto-generated minutes with natural-language instructions.

hero.h1: AI Edit: Your Minutes, Exactly the Way You Want Them
hero.tagline: Auto-generated meeting minutes are a great start — but they're rarely perfect on the first try. With AI Edit, you can now refine, restructure, and customize your minutes using simple natural-language instructions. Just tell the AI what you need, and watch your minutes transform.
hero.subtag: No more tedious manual edits. A single prompt can turn raw minutes into a polished, purpose-built document.

problem.p1: AI-generated meeting minutes are incredibly useful — they capture discussions, decisions, and action items automatically. But there's always been a gap between what the AI produces and what you actually need.
problem.p2: Maybe the format doesn't match your team's style. Maybe it's too verbose for a quick executive report, or too brief when you need granular action items. Until now, the only option was to manually rewrite sections — which defeats the purpose of using AI in the first place.
problem.quote: "The AI summary is good, but I always end up spending 15 minutes tweaking it."

solution.h2: Just Tell the AI What You Want
solution.p1: **AI Edit** changes everything. Instead of manually editing your minutes line by line, you simply give the AI a natural-language instruction — and it restructures the entire document for you.
solution.p2: It's like having a personal editor who understands context, tone, and purpose. Whether you need a complete rewrite or a subtle adjustment, AI Edit handles it effortlessly.
highlights: **"Make it executive-friendly"** — Strips out details and highlights key decisions and outcomes.
**"Make it more concise"** — Removes redundancy while preserving every critical point.
**"Extract detailed action items"** — Pulls out granular to-dos with owners and deadlines.
**"Rewrite for the engineering team"** — Adjusts tone and focus for a technical audience.
**"Add a summary at the top"** — Generates a brief overview without altering the body.

usps.h2: Why AI Edit is a Game-Changer

items.title: The 'Itchy Spot' is Finally Scratched
items.desc: Other AI minute services generate notes and leave you there. AI Edit goes further — it lets you keep refining until the output matches exactly what you had in mind.

items.title: Natural Language, No Learning Curve
items.desc: No templates. No dropdowns. No complicated settings. Just type what you want in plain language and AI Edit understands your intent.

items.title: Iterate as Many Times as You Like
items.desc: Not happy with the first edit? Give another instruction. You can refine the same document over and over until it's perfect — there's no limit.

pricing.p1: AI Edit is available across all Minutes.AI plans. Choose the plan that fits your workflow.

free.text: Try it free for 3 minutes every day — no credit card required.

bullets: **Time Packs**: Great for occasional use — minutes never expire.
**Subscriptions**: Unlimited recording and editing for power users.
**100+ Languages**: Record and edit minutes in over 100 languages.

cta.text: Record a meeting, generate your minutes, and give AI Edit a spin. You'll wonder how you ever worked without it.
